posts.author: Lonneke (Lonneke)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to create an automation using data from a mirror column. As an example the following automation:

When ‘Status - shipments’ changes to ‘received’ and only when ‘mirror column’ is IM TM’ > Then send an ‘email’ to ‘person’.
